theorem boolean_functions_cardinality (n : ℕ) :
    cardinal.mk ((Fin n → Fin 2) → Fin 2) = 2 ^ (2 ^ n) := by
  have h1 : cardinal.mk (Fin 2) = 2 := by
    rfl
  have h2 : cardinal.mk (Fin n → Fin 2) = 2 ^ n := by
    rw [cardinal.mk_fun, Nat.cast_inj]
    exact Nat.pow_succ 1 n
  rw
after_snippet:
import Mathlib

theorem boolean_functions_cardinality (n : ℕ) : 
  Fintype.card ((Fin n → Fin 2) → Fin 2) = 2 ^ (2 ^ n) := by
  have h1 : Fintype.card (Fin 2) = 2 := by decide
  have h2 : Fintype.card (Fin n → Fin 2) = 2 ^ n := by
    rw [Fintype.card_fun]
    simp [h1]
  rw [Fintype.card_fun]
  sim

open Set

/-- A set S is shattered by a family of sets F if every subset of S can be obtained
  as the intersection of S with some set in F. -/
def IsShattered (F : Set (Set α)) (s : Set α) : Prop :=
  ∀ t : Set α, t ⊆ s → ∃ a ∈ F, a ∩ s = t

/-- The VC dimension of a family of sets
